audience: people already joking that mercury broke their week
insight: the blame is ambient and communal, and nobody has receipts; a report built from your own drafts makes the joke personal
assetXElement: your drafts and typos x an official retrograde damage report
successMetric: generation to share rate within the retrograde window

referenceSet.note: official document parody format, personal receipts as the punchline; entertainment framing, no health or finance advice

generationPrompts.image: An official looking document titled RETROGRADE DAMAGE REPORT on a desk, stamped and annotated, listing comic entries like unsent drafts and autocorrect incidents, warm lamp light, paper texture, editorial photography, subtle grain. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 a phone with a chaotic drafts folder; shot 2 the damage report prints line by line; shot 3 the stamp lands and the hook line appears, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, deadpan tone about finally having paperwork for the chaos, no exclamation marks
